## Purpose
Describe the problem this pull request solves.

## Type of change
- [ ] Correction
- [ ] Clarification
- [ ] New lesson or section
- [ ] Scenario or exercise
- [ ] Assessment material
- [ ] Site or repository maintenance

## Curriculum alignment
Explain how this supports the program charter or curriculum design.

## Source and attribution check
- [ ] Official terminology has been checked where applicable.
- [ ] External factual claims are cited.
- [ ] The wording is original.
- [ ] No recalled examination questions are included.
- [ ] No confidential or personally identifiable information is included.

## Validation
- [ ] `mkdocs build --strict` succeeds locally.
- [ ] Links and navigation were checked.
